name: Friendly Great White
subject: animals/shark
prompt: a friendly cartoon great white shark swimming to the side, a big rounded body, a pointed snout with a wide open mouth showing rows of triangular teeth, a tall pointed dorsal fin, side fins, and a crescent tail, looking cheerful not scary

name: Hammerhead Shark
subject: animals/shark
prompt: a hammerhead shark swimming forward, its distinctive wide flat T-shaped head with an eye on each far end, a slim streamlined body, a tall curved dorsal fin, and a long sweeping tail

name: Gentle Whale Shark
subject: animals/shark
prompt: a huge gentle whale shark gliding through the water, a very wide flat mouth at the front, a broad rounded body patterned with a grid of round spots, large side fins, and tiny fish swimming alongside it

name: Baby Shark
subject: animals/shark
prompt: a cute chubby baby shark with big sparkly eyes and a small happy smile, a tiny rounded dorsal fin, little side fins, and a short wiggly tail, a few simple bubbles floating up beside it

name: Mako Shark Speeding
subject: animals/shark
prompt: a sleek fast mako shark angled as if darting forward, a very streamlined torpedo-shaped body, a sharp pointed snout, a crescent-shaped tail, and a few motion-style water swirls trailing behind it

name: Shark Face Close-Up
subject: animals/shark
prompt: a close-up front-facing portrait of a smiling shark head filling the frame, big round eyes, a wide open grinning mouth showing two rows of triangular teeth, gill slits on the sides, and the tips of its side fins at the bottom

name: Shark in the Coral Reef
subject: animals/shark
prompt: a reef shark swimming over a colorful coral reef, branching corals and rounded coral mounds below, a few wavy seaweed plants and small tropical fish around it, gentle bubbles rising to the surface

name: Tiger Shark
subject: animals/shark
prompt: a tiger shark swimming in profile, a blunt rounded snout, a sturdy body marked with bold vertical stripes along its back and sides, a tall dorsal fin, and a strong notched tail

name: Nurse Shark Resting
subject: animals/shark
prompt: a calm nurse shark resting on the sandy sea floor, a broad flat head with two small whisker-like barbels near its mouth, a long rounded body, low fins, and a few rocks and shells around it

name: Two Sharks Swimming
subject: animals/shark
prompt: two happy sharks swimming side by side in the same direction, one slightly larger than the other, both with smiling mouths, pointed dorsal fins, and wavy water lines around them

name: Shark and Treasure Chest
subject: animals/shark
prompt: a curious cartoon shark swimming above an open treasure chest on the ocean floor, the chest spilling out round coins and a few pearls, a couple of starfish and a pile of rocks nearby, bubbles drifting upward

name: Shark Jumping Out of Water
subject: animals/shark
prompt: an excited shark leaping up out of the ocean surface, body arched in the air with its mouth open in a grin, a big curved splash of water below it, and a few water droplets and bubbles flying around
